repair_history.diagnosis: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 182: Assume statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex is placed in component implementation instead of component type -> Move the entire AGREE annex block from ADIRU.EMV2 to ADIRU.impl

Assume statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex is placed in system implementation instead of system type -> Move the annex agree block from ADIRU.impl to ADIRU
left side of binary expression '=>' is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Port references used in boolean implication without proper AGREE expression syntax -> Replace port references with valid AGREE boolean expressions using '->' or equivalent
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'partitions::acc_process.impl' and 'partitions::acc_partition.impl', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in equality expressions between process and partition types -> Remove or rewrite binding assumptions to use valid component references
Couldn't resolve reference to 'main_cpu': Reference to undefined component 'main_cpu' in property assignments -> Remove or rewrite property assignments that reference undefined components
Property Deployment_Properties::Actual_Processor_Binding does not apply to ADIRU: Property applied to wrong component type -> Move property assignments to appropriate component implementation scope

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 103: mismatched input '.' expecting ';': AGREE annex block not properly closed before system implementation end -> Add missing semicolon after the closing brace of the AGREE annex block

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 103: mismatched input '.' expecting ';': Syntax error in AGREE annex block due to misplaced period -> Remove the period after 'end ADIRU.impl' in the AGREE annex block
